title: BEM-857 execute 856 next
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 21:11 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem856_verify_after_bem855.json')
ps=prev.get('status','unknown')
patched=[]
if ps=='dispatch_results_present':
    status='dispatch_results_parse_next'
    next_action='parse dispatch result and proceed to Claude runtime proof'
elif ps=='marker_present_no_results':
    commit=Path('scripts/commit_workflow_dispatch_results.sh')
    if commit.exists():
        ct=commit.read_text(errors='ignore')
        # Make result commit include all state/queue diagnostics and never silently skip.
        if 'governance/state/workflow_dispatch_queue_processor_marker.json' not in ct:
            ct=ct.replace('git add -A governance/workflow_dispatch_results', 'git add -A governance/workflow_dispatch_results governance/state/workflow_dispatch_queue_processor_marker.json')
        commit.write_text(ct)
        patched.append(str(commit))
    status='result_persistence_patched_or_confirmed'
    next_action='fresh queue item and tick, then verify results'
elif ps=='marker_missing_processor_not_running':
    runner=Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
    txt=runner.read_text(errors='ignore') if runner.exists() else ''
    # Add a fallback workflow_dispatch_queue marker step at top-level job if not present.
    if runner.exists() and 'Process workflow dispatch queue' not in txt:
        insert='''\n      - name: Process workflow dispatch queue\n        if: always()\n        env:\n          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT }}\n        run: bash scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.sh\n      - name: Commit workflow dispatch queue results\n        if: always()\n        run: bash scripts/commit_workflow_dispatch_results.sh\n'''
        marker='      - name: Complete job'
        if marker in txt: txt=txt.replace(marker,insert+marker,1)
        else: txt=txt+insert
        runner.write_text(txt)
        patched.append(str(runner))
    status='runner_processor_placement_patched_or_confirmed'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify marker/results'
else:
    status='unknown_processor_status'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-856 status'
state={'bem':'BEM-857','status':status,'bem856_status':ps,'patched':patched,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem857_execute_bem856_next.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem857_execute_bem856_next.md').write_text('# BEM-857 | Execute BEM-856 Next | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem857_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-857'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem857_execute_bem856_next.json','governance/reports/bem857_execute_bem856_next.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem857_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+patched
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-856 next action by patching result persistence or runner processor placement depending on marker/results status')
"""
